findings: Moderate label neighborhood conflicts detected around 'Bwd Packet Length Mean', 'Bwd Packet Length Std', and 'Avg Bwd Segment Size' features.
Duplicate label conflicts observed, indicating local label-topology inconsistencies within backward packet length features.
Structural irregularities are consistent with class-conditioned variation and unique value skew between BENIGN and DDoS classes.
contradictions: Local label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts remain unresolved.
limitations: Analysis limited to bounded local neighborhoods and available backward packet length features; global aggregation or rerouting not performed.
